rules.reason: Historical role model N=101, WR=82.18%, PF=13.66.
Displacement separates institutional expansion from low-quality imbalance.

rules.rule: Prefer SHORT setups when aligned with structure.
rules.reason: NSE short + displaced FVG produced N=133, WR=78.95%, PF=11.25.
Weak FVGs do not reflect strong institutional repricing.
Range/noise conditions dilute Silver Bullet precision.

rules.rule: Require OB overlap OR require higher score.
rules.reason: OB can help, but no-OB setups need stronger confluence.

rules.rule: Treat Forex as lower confidence until more live/backtest data improves.
rules.reason: Best Forex role model has acceptable but smaller sample: N=78.

rules.rule: Do not trust tiny-sample perfect results.
rules.reason: 100% WR at N<30 is research noise, not a live rule.

rules.rule: Store every mismatch between live trade and role model.
rules.reason: Mismatch analysis teaches which missing condition matters most.

rules.rule: After each trade, compare outcome against role model expectation.
rules.reason: The model must learn whether role-model similarity predicts live result.
